form.formComment: First starter by Alpine Eagle out of Cambalara. Runner-up March 31 at Launceston at his only public trial. Barrier an advantage. Respect any positive market move.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Alpine Eagle out of Cambalara. Runner-up March 31 at Launceston at his only public trial. Barrier an advantage. Respect any positive market move.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start sat on the pace when 3rd of 9 at Hobart Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1100m, 2.25 len behind Dina Tycoon with 58kg at $2.15. Before that held ground to the line 3rd of 10 at Hobart Mdn-Sw on February 15 over 1000m, slow going 1.2 len behind Outbush with 58kg at $2.90. Rates highly. Genuine type who should take catching.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Recent form sound. Last start sat on the pace when 3rd of 9 at Hobart Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1100m, 2.25 len behind Dina Tycoon with 58kg at $2.15. Before that held ground to the line 3rd of 10 at Hobart Mdn-Sw on February 15 over 1000m, slow going 1.2 len behind Outbush with 58kg at $2.90. Rates highly. Genuine type who should take catching.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out from the 200m. Bumped, at the 150m.
Raced three wide throughout. Tired over the concluding stages.
Bumped with Sunrise At Kirra on jumping.
Jumped outwards at the start, bumping with Taroona.

form.formComment: Returns from a 35-day let-up. Most recently 8th of 10 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 1450m, 5.5 len behind Man Of The Sea carrying 59kg at $14. The race before that settled back and ran on when 5th of 8 at Moe 3yo Mdn-Sw on February 22 over 1200m, 3 len behind Hook 'N' Spur carrying 58kg at $6. Former Victorian expected to hit the ground running.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Returns from a 35-day let-up. Most recently 8th of 10 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 1450m, 5.5 len behind Man Of The Sea carrying 59kg at $14. The race before that settled back and ran on when 5th of 8 at Moe 3yo Mdn-Sw on February 22 over 1200m, 3 len behind Hook 'N' Spur carrying 58kg at $6. Former Victorian expected to hit the ground running.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly. Raced wide for the majority of the event.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 9 at Hobart Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Dina Tycoon with 54.5kg at $9. The race before that raced on the pace before fading 7th of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 4 over 1220m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Woolclasser carrying 55kg at $9. Made late ground last time and is sure to be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). At the latest run 5th of 9 at Hobart Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Dina Tycoon with 54.5kg at $9. The race before that raced on the pace before fading 7th of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 4 over 1220m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Woolclasser carrying 55kg at $9. Made late ground last time and is sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of seven months. Finished off last preparation fifth of 11 at Hobart Mdn-Sw August 31 over 1000m, soft track; 10 len behind Georgaroni carrying 56.5kg at $51. Previously first up; tenth of 13 at this track Mdn-Sw August 3 over 1200m, soft track; 5.5 len behind Artillery Fire carrying 56.5kg at $21. Placed 2/2 course and distance and worth keeping safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Resuming after a break of seven months. Finished off last preparation fifth of 11 at Hobart Mdn-Sw August 31 over 1000m, soft track; 10 len behind Georgaroni carrying 56.5kg at $51. Previously first up; tenth of 13 at this track Mdn-Sw August 3 over 1200m, soft track; 5.5 len behind Artillery Fire carrying 56.5kg at $21. Placed 2/2 course and distance and worth keeping safe.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to muster early speed in the event.
Bumped at the start when Ride The Moon shifted out and lost ground.

form.formComment: Most recently 6th of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1200m, 3 len behind Dubai Affair with 54kg at $21. The run before that 3rd in a small field at Devonport Synthetic Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 1350m, 9 len behind Rippington carrying 56kg at $3. Thereabouts last time and drawn for a soft run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Most recently 6th of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1200m, 3 len behind Dubai Affair with 54kg at $21. The run before that 3rd in a small field at Devonport Synthetic Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 1350m, 9 len behind Rippington carrying 56kg at $3. Thereabouts last time and drawn for a soft run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping. Shifted in under pressure entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign sixth of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw November 26 over 1100m, 2 len behind Zulu Fields with 55kg at $4.20. When resuming last campaign fourth in a small field at this track Mdn-Sw October 3 over 1100m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Novalargo with 54kg at $18. Anticipating her to hit the ground running this campaign.
